product.name: Chill Culture Calm Crunch Minis
product.category: Health Foods > Functional Snacks > Adaptogenic Snacks
product.description: Crunchy cocoa clusters infused with adaptogens for functional relaxation. These mini bite-sized clusters combine oat crisps, dark cocoa, a hint of sea salt, and a functional blend of ashwagandha + L-theanine. Designed for Gen Z 'wind-down' moments -- late-night streaming, post-social decompressing, or quick study breaks -- they deliver indulgent flavor with calming support and no crash.
